name: compile-history
_note: tools.compile-history reads the caller's compile/transpile history from globalThis._concordSTATE.toolsLens.compileHistory, keyed by ctx.actor.userId. STATE-backed, per-user — {} returns ok:true with an empty history (NEVER no_db). Fail-CLOSED: a poisoned numeric limit returns ok:false invalid_limit BEFORE clamping.
